author: three.ws
quote: Your avatar now walks anywhere on the web. Drop it on any page with one tag, drive it with WASD or a joystick, and let it read articles aloud as it strolls.

author: three.ws Walk
quote: Six built-in worlds, real-time animation retargeting onto any humanoid rig, and a postMessage API so your site can steer the avatar. No app install — it just runs in the browser.

author: three.ws Extension
quote: Install the Chrome extension and your avatar follows you across the entire web — walking over real pages, narrating what you read, a living 3D browsing companion.
